title: Mini Beat Power Rockers: The Movie
original_title: Mini Beat Power Rockers: La Película
overview: After a wild party at Rainbow Day Care, Dolores announces that it's time for a nap. The Power Rockers don't want to follow her rules. Then Baby Marciano shows up and invites them to Planet Me, a planet without rules, where everything is possible.
